word: G2174 - εὐψυχέω - eupsychéō - yoo-psoo-kheh'-o - Be of good comfort

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Be of good comfort
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to be of good courage, to be of a cheerful spirit
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From a compound of G2095 and G5590; to be in good spirits, that is, feel encouraged: - be of good comfort.
